## Description

Brief description of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] New skill file
- [ ] New agent (v4.0 roadmap)
- [ ] Roadmap/stub

## HES Component

- [ ] SKILL.md (orchestrator)
- [ ] Skill file (skills/XX-name.md)
- [ ] Hook script (scripts/hooks/)
- [ ] CI/CD (GitHub Actions)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Agent registry (.hes/agents/registry.json)
- [ ] Schemas (.hes/schemas/)
- [ ] Other: _______________

## HES Phase

Which HES phase does this relate to?

- [ ] ZERO (bootstrap)
- [ ] DISCOVERY
- [ ] SPEC
- [ ] DESIGN
- [ ] DATA
- [ ] RED (tests)
- [ ] GREEN (implementation)
- [ ] SECURITY
- [ ] REVIEW
- [ ] DONE
- [ ] SYSTEM (cross-cutting)

## Checklist

- [ ] I have linked an issue (bug or improvement)
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally
- [ ] I have added notes about what was tested and how
- [ ] For stubs v4.0: `status: stub` and `target_version` in skill file header

## Testing Notes

What was tested, how it was tested, and any observations.

```
Paste testing output here
```

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number)
